The House-Brackmann grading scale specifically focuses on evaluating various aspects of facial nerve function due to its critical role in controlling facial muscles. This makes it uniquely suited for detailed assessments related to this particular cranial nerve compared to other nerves listed like hypoglossal, vagus, or trigeminal. 

Answer Choice: A. Facial Nerve.
